creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to tech-lists from comment #199)
~ $ pciconf -lv | grep -i usb
    device     = '200 Series/Z370 Chipset Family USB 3.0 xHCI Controller'
    subclass   = USB
    device     = 'ASM1142 USB 3.1 Host Controller'
    subclass   = USB
    device     = 'JHL6540 Thunderbolt 3 USB Controller (C step) [Alpine Ridge 4C 2016]'
    subclass   = USB
~ $
~ $ cat /usr/src/sys/amd64/conf/GENERIC | grep -i xhci
device          xhci                    # XHCI PCI->USB interface (USB 3.0)
